selected_dialects.reason: Plain washer: outer dia 100, inner bore 40, thickness 20 — directly mappable to revolve_profile + cut_center_bore + cut_circular_hole_pattern (6x Ø8 on PCD 70). Axisymmetric dialect is the correct generative route.
